A

AbstractCommand - Class in life.qbic.cli
Abstract class that encapsulates all common command-line arguments using picocli annotations.
AbstractCommand() - Constructor for class life.qbic.cli.AbstractCommand
 
ApplicationException - Exception in life.qbic.exceptions
Handy all-encompassing runtime exception.
ApplicationException(String) - Constructor for exception life.qbic.exceptions.ApplicationException
 
ApplicationException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception life.qbic.exceptions.ApplicationException
 

D

DEFAULT_NAME - Static variable in class life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor
 
DEFAULT_REPO - Static variable in class life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor
 
DEFAULT_VERSION - Static variable in class life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor
 

E

execute() - Method in interface life.qbic.cli.Tool
Implementations should use this method as the "main" method.
extractToolMetadata() - Method in class life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor
Extracts tool name, version and repository URL from ToolExecutor.TOOL_PROPERTIES_PATH.

G

getCommand() - Method in class life.qbic.cli.QBiCTool
 
getToolName() - Method in class life.qbic.cli.ToolMetadata
 
getToolRepoUrl() - Method in class life.qbic.cli.ToolMetadata
 
getToolVersion() - Method in class life.qbic.cli.ToolMetadata
 

H

handleCommonParameters(ToolMetadata, AbstractCommand) - Method in class life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor
Handles the standard and --version parameters which all QBiCTool are able to handle.

I

invoke(Class<? extends QBiCTool<T>>, Class<T>, String[]) - Method in class life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor
Invokes the given QBiCTool.

L

life.qbic.cli - package life.qbic.cli
 
life.qbic.exceptions - package life.qbic.exceptions
 

P

parseArguments(Class<T>, String[]) - Static method in class life.qbic.cli.AbstractCommand
Utility method to parse the given command-line arguments as a command using the CommandLine.populateCommand(Object, String...) method.
printHelp - Variable in class life.qbic.cli.AbstractCommand
Standard -h/--help to print help and exit.
printVersion - Variable in class life.qbic.cli.AbstractCommand
Standard -v/--version to print version and exit.

Q

QBiCTool<T extends AbstractCommand> - Class in life.qbic.cli
Tools implementations derive from this base class.
QBiCTool(T) - Constructor for class life.qbic.cli.QBiCTool
Constructor.

S

shutdown() - Method in class life.qbic.cli.QBiCTool
 
shutdown() - Method in interface life.qbic.cli.Tool
Invoked before the virtual machine is about to shutdown.

T

Tool - Interface in life.qbic.cli
Interface that represents command-line tools and services such as daemons.
TOOL_PROPERTIES_PATH - Static variable in class life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor
 
ToolExecutor - Class in life.qbic.cli
Class that coordinates execution of generic command-line QBiCTools.
ToolExecutor() - Constructor for class life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor
 
ToolMetadata - Class in life.qbic.cli
Simple struct-like class to hold information about tools.
ToolMetadata(String, String, String) - Constructor for class life.qbic.cli.ToolMetadata
 

V

validateParametersAndParseCommandlineArguments(Class<?>, Class<? extends AbstractCommand>, String[]) - Method in class life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor
Validates that the passed parameters are not null and parses the given args as a command of the class commandClass.
